protocol.gallery: all cached nuScenes evaluation segments except the query
protocol.relevance: same intersection cluster and same maneuver label
protocol.outcome_composition: top-k fractions split into relevant, same-cluster wrong-label, and wrong-cluster candidates
protocol.cascade: BoT top-k then encoder-sequence-DTW rerank; AP@k truncated by total relevant
protocol.selection: leave-one-intersection-out; held-out cluster excluded from tuning queries and tuning galleries; evaluated on the full evaluation gallery
protocol.uncertainty: intersection-cluster bootstrap over fixed out-of-fold query metrics

categories.relevant: same intersection cluster and same maneuver label
categories.same_cluster_wrong_label: same intersection cluster and different maneuver label
